blocks.content: Thursday call. He answered before it even fully rang.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Good. Project wrapped. Had a thing Friday night.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Yeah. The group went out to celebrate.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Fine. LA parties are different. Big house, backyard, everybody's got a project they want to tell you about.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Yeah she was there. She's in the group.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Study group ran late Monday. Jordan had a lot of thoughts about Faulkner.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: A lot of thoughts about Faulkner.
Another pause. Both of them aware of it.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Is there something you want to say.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: No. Is there something you want to say.
Quiet on the line. The honest kind.
They moved on. Talked about other things.
